pain_point: Limited knowledge or interest in futures trading despite curiosity or desire to branch out.
hook: 100% free futures trading course built by traders and an industry-leading prop firm.
offer_mechanism: Comprehensive 90-minute course that is self-paced, designed for beginners to advanced learners of any background.
cta: Click to get started. Ready to dive in?
notes: Target audience includes beginners, crypto/stock/options traders, and those interested in learning over following hype.
